   - **Microsoft Teams User Activity**

**Overview**

This dashboard offers a comprehensive view of insights into the Microsoft Teams User Activity in your organization.

It provides essential metrics such as call counts, message counts, and audio duration. It contains a view of total active users broken-down by activity type per day. It also includes several timeline visualisations such as message counts by message type, meeting counts by meeting type, and top users sending private chat messages.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/o365/overview)
